name: Sure.jell® Peach Jam
recipeIngredient: 3 1/3 cups prepared fruit (about 3 lbs. fully ripe peaches)
1 box SURE.JELL Pectin for Lower Sugar Recipes -- Fruit Pectin
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse clean plastic containers and lids with boiling water.
2. Peel, pit, and finely chop or grind the peaches.
3. Measure 3 1/3 cups of chopped peaches into a large bowl or pan.
4. Add lemon juice to the fruit mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, measure sugar (scrape extra sugar off the cup to level for an exact measure).
6. Mix together 1/4 cup of sugar and the pectin in a small bowl.
7. Gradually add the pectin mixture to the fruit, stirring vigorously.
8. Let stand for 30 minutes; stir occasionally.
9. Gradually stir the remaining sugar into the fruit mixture until it is well combined.
10. Fill all containers with the jam mixture, leaving 1/2 inch of space at the top.
11. Wipe off the top edges of the containers and quickly cover with lids.
12. Let stand at room temperature for 24 hours.
13. Jam is now ready to use. Store in the refrigerator up to 3 weeks or freeze extra containers for up to 1 year. Thaw in the refrigerator before use.
